author: doll-agent
content:
Deferred: substantial refactor across Dimension trait + every indexing method.

The refactor:
1. Extend Dimension with rank-relating associated types (mirroring ndarray's RemoveAxis/InsertAxis): type Smaller: Dimension; type Larger: Dimension. Ix2::Smaller = Ix1, Ix3::Smaller = Ix2, IxDyn::Smaller = IxDyn (closed under the operation).
2. Change index_axis/slice_axis/insert_axis return types from ArrayView<T, IxDyn> to ArrayView<T, D::Smaller>/<T, D::Larger>. ~10 signatures across owned.rs, view.rs, view_mut.rs, indexing/basic.rs.
3. Update call sites that consumed IxDyn. Some genuinely want IxDyn (dynamic-rank algorithms); they keep .into_dyn() at the boundary.
4. Update batch ops in ferray-linalg, ferray-fft etc. that currently exploit the IxDyn return shape. ~20 call sites workspace-wide.

Scope: ~3-4 days dedicated work across ferray-core + half the downstream crates.

Worth doing eventually because ferray's selling point is compile-time rank safety; losing it at every index_axis is a real wart. The D::NdarrayDim: ndarray::RemoveAxis bounds in 10+ method signatures already encode the constraint conceptually - just not exposed at the type level.

Deferred because the change cuts across many files and risks regressing batch ops that the IxDyn shape smoothly handled. Lands best as a single coordinated PR.

Closing as decided-future. Filed as roadmap.
